name: @superimg/codex-plugin
description: Codex CLI plugin for SuperImg — exposes the SuperImg skill and MCP server to Codex via the OpenAI Codex plugin system.

scripts.build:dev: SUPERIMG_PLUGIN_DEV=1 tsx scripts/generate-plugin-skill.ts && SUPERIMG_PLUGIN_DEV=1 tsx scripts/generate-plugin-mcp.ts
